summary: iOS 🟥 HSFWCH-10257 | FALCON 🎧 Custom EQ settings are not saved
scenario: Custom EQ slider positions reset to default after saving and reopening EQ settings on Device Settings > Sound > Tune
description_clean: Custom EQ settings are not saved. Steps: Pair device with app, go to Device Settings > Sound > Tune, select Custom, change sliders, tap Save EQ, then close and reopen EQ settings. Observed: Custom EQ is selected but all sliders reset to default (middle) position. Expected: Changes to custom EQ sliders should be properly saved.
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure your Poly Bluetooth audio device is paired and connected to the app.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Navigate to Audio Settings → Equalizer (or Sound → Tune).
6. Adjust one or more EQ sliders (e.g., move some sliders up or down from the default center position).
7. Tap the "Save EQ" button to save the custom settings.
8. Close the Equalizer screen (e.g., tap Back or navigate away).
9. Re-open the Equalizer screen by going back to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
expected: The Custom EQ preset remains selected, and all slider positions reflect the previously saved custom adjustments.
actual: The Custom EQ preset is selected, but all sliders have reset to the default (center/middle) position, discarding the saved custom changes.
